name: tool-retries-with-recovery
description: 15% of traces have error spans on the retrieval step (vector search returns empty), but all traces complete successfully because the agent retries with keyword fallback. Span-level errors with trace-level recovery are not issues.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

spans.errors_summary: empty result set from vector store

error.sample_error: Vector search returned 0 results for query embedding

duration.note: retry adds ~350ms but all traces complete successfully
